my_thoughts: My intent says 'dismantle the core assumption' but the student is in objectifying_seeking. Am I trying to shift their frame or are they already shifting? The constraint_collapse mechanism suggests I'm doing something, but maybe they're doing it to themselves and I'm just naming it. Who labels the labeler?
accumulated_insight: Initial observation: Student in objectifying_seeking showing conceptual_grasping, self_as_object. Beginning pattern tracking.
visible_response:
The self you want to know, is it some second self?
Are you made of several selves? Surely, there is only one self and you are that self.
The self you are is the only self there is.
Remove and abandon your wrong ideas about yourself and there it is, in all its glory.
It is only your mind that prevents self-knowledge.
